title: WMI Provider Host Spawning Suspicious Child Process
description: Detects WmiPrvSE.exe (WMI Provider Host) spawning command-line interpreters or scripting engines. This indicates WMI-based execution or lateral movement via WMIC remote exec, Invoke-WmiMethod, or WMI event subscriptions. Legitimate WMI operations almost never spawn cmd.exe or PowerShell directly.
falsepositives: Rare: WMI-based management software that legitimately uses WMI to run scripts
